content:
📌 2.4 Assignments, Discussions & Quizzes

📝 Assignments:
• Title, instructions, rubric, and submission details.
• Submission type (File Upload, Text Entry, etc.) clearly marked.
• Example:

### 📝 | 3.12 | Week 3 | Narrative Essay First Draft | Assignment



💬 Discussions:
• Initial Post Prompt & Response Guidelines clearly defined.
• Engagement expectations (peer replies, APA citation rules, etc.).
• Rubric (formatted in tables).

📊 Quizzes:
• Time limit, attempts, and covered topics clearly outlined.
• Example:

### 📊 | 4.16 | Week 4 | Quiz: Compare & Contrast Essay Structure | Quiz

📌 3. Adaptive Content Mapping (Ensuring Every Slide & Assignment is Included)
context: From document: ENG 101 | Course Content Formatting & Protocols — chunk 6 (chunk 6/8)
